label: A안 — 인물 + 구체 사건 (승리 공식)
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Jerome Powell, US Federal Reserve Chairman, looking stern and concerned, standing in front of a massive digital stock market display showing red numbers and a dramatic downward chart. The KOSPI index number '8,411' is prominently displayed in glowing red. Dark moody lighting with deep navy blue and red accent colors. His expression conveys gravity and tension. High contrast cinematic lighting from the side. Ultra detailed, 8K quality. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: B안 — 차트/오브젝트 중심
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic visualization of a cracking glass stock market chart with the Korean KOSPI index line plunging sharply downward. The chart shows a dramatic 8% cliff drop with red warning indicators. Behind the chart, a split image: left side shows gleaming semiconductor chips in golden light (prosperity), right side shows crumbling construction buildings in dark shadows (decay). The visual contrast between the two halves is stark and dramatic. Deep navy blue background with red and gold accent lighting. Ultra detailed, 8K quality. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: 와일드카드 — 다른 인물
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Lee Chang-yong, Bank of Korea Governor, in a dark suit, holding up a thick financial stability report document. His expression is serious and warning. Behind him, a split screen effect: one side shows semiconductor chips glowing bright gold, the other side shows dark shadowy buildings representing struggling industries. The number '48.1%' appears as a faint holographic overlay. Dramatic side lighting with deep navy blue and urgent red accent colors. Tension and gravity in the composition. Ultra detailed, 8K quality. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
